tasks.title: Project Bootstrap and Repo Structure
tasks.description: Initialize monorepo with Bulletproof React frontend structure and Hono backend following specified standards
tasks.details: Create repo structure per Bulletproof React (https://github.com/alan2207/bulletproof-react/blob/master/docs/project-structure.md): /frontend (React/TS HubSpot extension), /backend (Hono/TS), /shared (types/domain), /docker-compose.yml. Use Google TS style guide and filename conventions. Initialize git, husky, lint-staged. Add .env.example with required vars (HUBSPOT_APP_ID, EXA_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL). Verify HubSpot extension docs for crm.record.tab. Include Vercel CLI as a deployment/preview tool only, not as the primary data store. The actual application data layer remains Postgres/Supabase. Add HubSpot CLI and Vercel CLI setup/verification early so local development can test HubSpot extensions and deployment workflow intentionally.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify folder structure matches Bulletproof React spec, lint passes, docker-compose up starts services without errors, env validation works

subtasks.title: Initialize Git Repository and Core Folder Structure
subtasks.description: Create the monorepo root and Bulletproof React specified directories: /frontend, /backend, /shared, plus docker-compose.yml placeholder.
subtasks.details: Use mkdir -p to create /frontend (React/TS HubSpot extension), /backend (Hono/TS), /shared (types/domain). Initialize git with git init, create .gitignore for Node/Docker. Follow Google TS style guide for kebab-case filenames.
subtasks.testStrategy: Write Vitest test to verify exact folder structure matches Bulletproof React spec using fs.existsSync() on each required path before any code implementation.

subtasks.title: Install and Verify HubSpot CLI and Vercel CLI
subtasks.description: Install both CLIs, verify versions, authenticate where needed, and document their intended use in the stack.
subtasks.details: Install latest @hubspot/cli and Vercel CLI. Verify HubSpot CLI can auth and run project/dev commands. Verify Vercel CLI can login and is treated as deployment/preview infrastructure tooling, not the primary data host. Document versions and commands in repo docs.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run hs --version, hs account auth readiness check, vercel --version, and vercel login/whoami verification before depending on either CLI in implementation.

subtasks.title: Setup TypeScript Configurations and Monorepo tsconfig.json
subtasks.description: Configure root tsconfig.json with paths for frontend/backend/shared, composite project references, and Google TS style guide compliance.
subtasks.details: Create tsconfig.json with 'composite': true, 'paths' mapping @frontend/* to frontend/src/* etc., strict mode enabled. Add package.json with workspaces: ['frontend', 'backend', 'shared']. Use Google naming conventions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Vitest test: tsc --noEmit should pass without errors on empty projects, verify path resolution by importing shared types in test files first.

subtasks.title: Configure Docker Compose with Postgres, Backend, and Frontend Services
subtasks.description: Create docker-compose.yml with postgres service, backend dev server, frontend dev server per standards.
subtasks.details: Define services: postgres (latest, DATABASE_URL env), backend (node:20, vol mount backend), frontend (node:20, vol mount frontend). Add healthchecks and depends_on for postgres.
subtasks.testStrategy: Shell script test via Vitest: docker-compose up -d && docker-compose ps shows all services healthy, no errors in logs before implementation.

subtasks.title: Setup Environment Variables and Validation with .env.example
subtasks.description: Create .env.example with HUBSPOT_APP_ID, EXA_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL and basic validation schema.
subtasks.details: Use zod or env-schema for validation. Add validation script in package.json: 'validate-env'. Ensure vars match HubSpot extension docs for crm.record.tab context.
subtasks.testStrategy: Vitest test: validate-env script passes with sample .env values, fails gracefully with missing vars before any app code.

subtasks.title: Configure Linting, Formatting, Husky, and Lint-Staged
subtasks.description: Setup ESLint/Prettier per Google TS style guide, husky pre-commit hooks, lint-staged for monorepo.
subtasks.details: Root .eslintrc.js with Google TS rules, .prettierrc. Husky install, lint-staged config for staged files across workspaces. Kebab-case filename lint rule.
subtasks.testStrategy: Vitest test: Run lint/format on dummy files, husky hooks trigger correctly on git commit simulation before real code.

subtasks.title: Initialize Vitest Testing Framework Across Monorepo
subtasks.description: Setup Vitest configs for frontend/backend/shared with monorepo workspace support and TDD readiness.
subtasks.details: package.json scripts: 'test', 'test:watch'. vitest.config.ts per workspace with globals, coverage. Hono testing with app.request(), React with jsdom.
subtasks.testStrategy: Self-test: Vitest passes empty test suite (e.g., test('bootstrap', () => expect(true).toBe(true)) across all workspaces first.

subtasks.title: Create CI Skeleton with GitHub Actions Workflow
subtasks.description: Add .github/workflows/ci.yml for lint, test, build on push/PR with monorepo path filtering.
subtasks.details: Matrix strategy for frontend/backend/shared. Steps: checkout, setup-node/uv, validate-env, lint, vitest, docker-compose build. Selective builds on changed paths.
subtasks.testStrategy: Local test: act or manual trigger verifies workflow syntax and runs successfully on bootstrap state before full implementation.

subtasks.title: Verification: Run Full Bootstrap Tests and Structure Audit
subtasks.description: Execute complete bootstrap verification: lint, test, docker up, env validation, HubSpot docs check.
subtasks.details: Create verify-bootstrap script: git status clean, docker-compose up healthy, lint/test pass, folder structure audit vs Bulletproof React spec, verify HubSpot crm.record.tab docs integration readiness.
subtasks.testStrategy: Vitest integration test suite: Run verify-bootstrap script programmatically, assert all checks pass (exit code 0), docker services responsive, no lint errors.

tasks.title: Database Schema and Drizzle ORM Setup
tasks.description: Define Postgres schema for evidence objects, snapshots, and config using Drizzle ORM
tasks.details: Create Drizzle schema per https://orm.drizzle.team/docs/sql-schema-declaration: tables for snapshots (company_id, eligibility_state, reason_to_contact, created_at, trust_score), evidence (id, source, timestamp, confidence, content), people (id, company_snapshot_id, name, reason_to_talk, evidence_refs), config (provider_settings, thresholds). Generate migrations. Use Supabase/Postgres. Add TypeScript types in /shared.
tasks.testStrategy: Run migrations, verify schema with Drizzle Studio, insert/query test data via generated client, ensure all required fields present

subtasks.title: Setup Drizzle ORM Configuration
subtasks.description: Initialize Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL driver and configure for Supabase connection including schema file structure.
subtasks.details: Install drizzle-orm, drizzle-kit, pg dependencies. Create drizzle.config.ts with Supabase DATABASE_URL. Setup schema/index.ts exporting all tables. Reference https://orm.drizzle.team/docs/sql-schema-declaration.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify config runs without errors: npx drizzle-kit generate, check generated files structure.

subtasks.title: Create Tenants/Workspaces Table
subtasks.description: Define tenants table with id, hubspot_portal_id (unique), name, created_at, settings jsonb using pgTable.
subtasks.details: Use serial/integer for id, varchar for hubspot_portal_id with unique index, text for name, timestamp for created_at, jsonb for settings. Add primary key on id.
subtasks.testStrategy: Insert tenant record via Drizzle client, verify unique constraint on hubspot_portal_id.

subtasks.title: Define Snapshots Table with Tenant Isolation
subtasks.description: Create snapshots table including tenant_id FK, company_id, eligibility_state, reason_to_contact, created_at, trust_score with composite indexes.
subtasks.details: Add tenant_id integer references tenants(id) onDelete cascade. Composite index on (tenant_id, company_id). Fields: eligibility_state enum, reason_to_contact text, trust_score numeric.
subtasks.testStrategy: Insert snapshot for tenant A, verify query scoped by tenant_id returns correct data.

subtasks.title: Define Evidence Table with Tenant Isolation
subtasks.description: Create evidence table with id, tenant_id FK, source, timestamp, confidence, content.
subtasks.details: tenant_id references tenants(id) cascade. id uuid or serial, source varchar, timestamp timestamptz, confidence numeric(0,2), content text. Index on (tenant_id, timestamp).
subtasks.testStrategy: Insert evidence for different tenants, verify tenant-scoped queries isolate data correctly.

subtasks.title: Define People Table with Tenant Isolation
subtasks.description: Create people table with id, tenant_id FK, company_snapshot_id FK, name, reason_to_talk, evidence_refs jsonb.
subtasks.details: tenant_id and company_snapshot_id (references snapshots(id)) both cascade. evidence_refs as jsonb array of evidence ids. Composite index (tenant_id, company_snapshot_id).
subtasks.testStrategy: Insert people linked to snapshot, verify FK constraints and tenant isolation.

subtasks.title: Create Provider and LLM Config Tables
subtasks.description: Define provider_config and llm_config tables both with tenant_id FK for per-tenant settings.
subtasks.details: llm_config: tenant_id, provider_name enum, model_name varchar, api_key_encrypted text, endpoint_url varchar, settings jsonb. provider_config similar structure. Unique constraint (tenant_id, provider_name).
subtasks.testStrategy: Insert config for tenant A, verify cannot insert duplicate provider for same tenant.

subtasks.title: Generate Migrations and Run Schema
subtasks.description: Generate and apply Drizzle migrations, verify schema in Supabase with all tenant_id columns and indexes.
subtasks.details: Run npx drizzle-kit generate:pg && npx drizzle-kit push:pg. Verify via Supabase dashboard or Drizzle Studio. Check FKs cascade on tenant delete.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run migrations, use Drizzle Studio to verify all tables/columns/indexes/FKs present.

subtasks.title: Add TypeScript Types and Tenant Isolation Tests
subtasks.description: Export Drizzle types to /shared/types, write tests verifying tenant isolation and cross-tenant leakage prevention.
subtasks.details: Create index.d.ts exporting InferSelectModel for all tables. Tests: insert tenant A/B data, query tenant A must not see B data. Test FK cascade delete.
subtasks.testStrategy: Jest/Vitest: 100% coverage on isolation tests, verify query scoping middleware or DB queries filter by tenant_id.

tasks.title: HubSpot Extension Frontend Scaffold
tasks.description: Build React/TS HubSpot UI extension for crm.record.tab with hsmeta context access
tasks.details: Scaffold React app with Vite/TS, HubSpot CLI integration. Implement hsMeta context hook to extract current company record (companyId, properties). Create basic tab layout with loading/empty states. Use Bulletproof React modules: features/, entities/, ui/. Verify HubSpot docs for latest crm.record.tab API and context shape.
tasks.testStrategy: Local HubSpot dev server renders extension in company record tab, hsMeta provides company context, basic layout renders without errors

subtasks.title: Setup HubSpot CLI and Initialize Project
subtasks.description: Install HubSpot CLI, create new UI extension project for crm.record.tab, and run initial hs project dev server.
subtasks.details: Use 'hs project create' or 'hs project add' for crm.record.tab location. Authenticate CLI with HubSpot account. Verify dev server starts without errors and basic scaffold generates.
subtasks.testStrategy: CLI commands execute successfully, dev server runs on localhost, no authentication errors in terminal.

subtasks.title: Configure Project Files for Vite/TS and HubSpot
subtasks.description: Create and configure hsproject.json, app.json, app-hsmeta.json with platformVersion 2025.2, scopes, and permittedUrls.
subtasks.details: Set location: 'crm.record.tab' in app.json. Add Vite/TS config for React. Include serverless.json if needed. Ensure Bulletproof React structure: features/, entities/, ui/ folders.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate JSON schemas with CLI, hs project upload succeeds, permittedUrls allow necessary fetches.

subtasks.title: Implement Extension Entry Point with hubspot.extend
subtasks.description: Create main extension file using hubspot.extend<'crm.record.tab'> passing context to React Extension component.
subtasks.details: Import from '@hubspot/ui-extensions'. Destructure context and actions. Render <Extension context={context} />. Use TypeScript for type safety per HubSpot docs.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test entry point renders without crashing using createRenderer('crm.record.tab').

subtasks.title: Develop hsMeta Context Hook for Company Record
subtasks.description: Create custom React hook to extract companyId, properties from context, using fetchCrmObjectProperties and onCrmPropertiesUpdate.
subtasks.details: Place in features/ or entities/. Handle loading states. Access context.portal.id, context.objectTypeId. Fetch company properties relevant to task.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock context in Vitest, verify hook returns companyId and properties, test updates trigger re-fetch.

subtasks.title: Build Basic Tab Layout with HubSpot UI Components
subtasks.description: Design layout using Flex, Text, Tile, LoadingSpinner from @hubspot/ui-extensions for crm.record.tab.
subtasks.details: Structure in ui/ folder per Bulletproof React. Integrate context hook data. Ensure responsive design matching HubSpot native look.
subtasks.testStrategy: Visual regression tests for layout, component renders correctly with mock props.

subtasks.title: Add Loading and Empty States to Extension
subtasks.description: Implement loading spinner and empty state UI with proper messaging using HubSpot Alert and Text components.
subtasks.details: Conditional rendering based on context hook state. Show 'Loading company data...' and 'No data available' states. Follow TDD: tests first.
subtasks.testStrategy: TDD with createRenderer: test loading state shows spinner, empty state shows message, transitions correctly.

subtasks.title: Setup Vitest TDD Environment and Verify Integration
subtasks.description: Configure Vitest with @hubspot/ui-extensions/testing, write tests for all components, run hs project dev and verify in HubSpot.
subtasks.details: Use createRenderer('crm.record.tab') for all tests. Test context access, states. Lint, build, upload, and inspect in company record tab.
subtasks.testStrategy: 100% test coverage for scaffold, all states pass, extension renders in local HubSpot dev server without console errors.

subtasks.title: Create HubSpot developer test account and import mock data
subtasks.description: Create a separate HubSpot development/test account, install the app there, and import mock CRM data for realistic company-record testing.
subtasks.details: Use HubSpot CLI configurable or developer test account flow. Prefer isolated developer test account for first validation. Create/import mock company and contact data so crm.record.tab can be tested against realistic target-account scenarios. Include hs test-account create and hs test-account import-data workflow or equivalent current documented HubSpot flow. Ensure at least one target account using hs_is_target_account and several company/contact fixtures covering strong evidence, <3 contacts, empty, stale, degraded, and ineligible states.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify the test account exists, the app is installed into it, mock data imports successfully, and the extension renders against real company records in the test account.

tasks.title: Backend API with Hono and Snapshot Endpoint
tasks.description: Implement Hono backend with /api/snapshot/:companyId endpoint returning snapshot contract
tasks.details: Setup Hono app with CORS for HubSpot origin, Drizzle integration. Create POST /api/snapshot/:companyId that returns {eligibility, reasonToContact, people: [], evidenceRefs, stateFlags}. Add auth middleware for HubSpot app tokens. Use async/await, structured logging. Verify Hono routing patterns from docs.
tasks.testStrategy: curl/postman calls return 200 with mock snapshot JSON matching contract, error handling for invalid companyId, auth required

subtasks.title: Write TDD tests for Hono app initialization and CORS
subtasks.description: Create Vitest test suite using app.request() to verify Hono app starts, CORS allows HubSpot origin, and rejects invalid origins before implementation.
subtasks.details: Test 200 OPTIONS preflight from HubSpot origin, 403 from others. Use testClient(app) for type-safe requests. Mock no DB yet. Cover middleware order per Hono docs.
subtasks.testStrategy: Vitest: expect(app.request('OPTIONS /api/snapshot/test', {headers: {Origin: 'hubspot.com'}})).toHaveStatus(200)

subtasks.title: Initialize Hono app with CORS middleware for HubSpot
subtasks.description: Setup base Hono app with typed Variables, CORS middleware for HubSpot origin, structured logger, and Node.js serve export.
subtasks.details: Use new Hono<{Variables: AppVariables}>(), app.use('/api/*', cors({origin: c.env.CORS_ORIGIN})), logger() before handlers. Export serve({fetch: app.fetch}).
subtasks.testStrategy: Run tests from subtask 1; verify app starts without errors, CORS headers present in responses.

subtasks.title: Write TDD tests for auth middleware and 401 responses
subtasks.description: Add Vitest tests for bearerAuth middleware: 401 without token, 200 with valid HubSpot app token before implementing endpoint.
subtasks.details: Test POST /api/snapshot/:companyId requires Authorization: Bearer <token>. Mock token validation. Verify middleware chaining order.
subtasks.testStrategy: expect(app.request('POST /api/snapshot/test')).toHaveStatus(401); expect(with token).toHaveStatus(200)

subtasks.title: Implement bearerAuth middleware for HubSpot tokens
subtasks.description: Add bearerAuth middleware to /api/* routes validating HubSpot app tokens from env or DB whitelist.
subtasks.details: import {bearerAuth} from 'hono/bearer-auth'; app.use('/api/*', bearerAuth({token: process.env.HUBSPOT_TOKENS.split(',')})). Set c.set('auth', true) on success.
subtasks.testStrategy: Pass auth tests from subtask 3; test invalid token returns 401 JSON error.

subtasks.title: Write TDD tests for snapshot endpoint responses
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive tests for POST /api/snapshot/:companyId: 200 with full contract, 400 invalid ID, 404 not found, using app.request().
subtasks.details:
Mock DB responses. Test contract: {eligibilityState, reasonToContact?, people:[], evidenceRefs:[], stateFlags:{stale,etc}}. Verify JSON structure and status codes.
<info added on 2026-04-10T23:33:07.980Z>
Tenant isolation requirements: All snapshot endpoint tests must verify tenant-scoped data access. Implementation must: (1) extract tenant_id from auth context using tenant resolution middleware after bearerAuth validates HubSpot token, (2) scope all DB queries with WHERE tenant_id = ? filter, (3) ensure response contains only snapshots belonging to the authenticated tenant's portal. Mock DB responses must include tenant_id in filtering logic. Add test cases: tenant A requests snapshot, verify only tenant A data returned; tenant B requests same snapshot ID, verify 404 or access denied; cross-tenant query attempts rejected. Verify bearerAuth middleware (per subtask 4.4) passes tenant context to handlers before DB access.
</info added on 2026-04-10T23:33:07.980Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Vitest: mock db query, expect(c.json(snapshotContract)).toMatchSnapshot(), error cases 400/404.

subtasks.title: Integrate Drizzle DB client and implement snapshot query
subtasks.description: Setup Drizzle client import, query snapshots table by companyId, map to contract with async/await.
subtasks.details:
import db from './db'; In handler: const snapshot = await db.query.snapshots.findFirst({where: eq(snapshots.companyId, id)}); return c.json(mapToContract(snapshot)).
<info added on 2026-04-10T23:33:18.826Z>
TENANT ISOLATION UPDATE: Drizzle DB client must always scope queries by tenant_id. Create a tenant-scoped DB helper: getTenantDb(tenantId) that wraps all queries with WHERE tenant_id = ?. The snapshot query must be: db.query.snapshots.findFirst({ where: and(eq(snapshots.tenantId, tenantId), eq(snapshots.companyId, companyId)) }). Never query without tenant filter.
</info added on 2026-04-10T23:33:18.826Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock Drizzle queries in tests; verify query params and result mapping.

subtasks.title: Add error handling, implement endpoint, verify all tests
subtasks.description: Create POST /api/snapshot/:companyId route with auth+CORS+DB+error handling (400 invalid ID, 500 DB error). Run full TDD suite.
subtasks.details: app.post('/api/snapshot/:companyId', auth, async (c)=>{try{...}catch{e=400/500}}); Use c.req.param('companyId'), structured logging c.get('logger').
subtasks.testStrategy: All subtasks 1,3,5 tests pass + integration: curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer token' POST /api/snapshot/valid returns 200 contract JSON.

tasks.title: Domain Model and Evidence Object Types
tasks.description: Define TypeScript domain models for snapshot contract, evidence, trust states per PRD
tasks.details: In /shared/types: Snapshot type with eligibilityState, reasonToContact?: string, people: Person[], evidence: Evidence[], states: StateFlags. Evidence {source, timestamp, confidence, content}. Person {name, title, reasonToTalk, evidenceRefs}. StateFlags {stale, degraded, lowConfidence, ineligible, restricted}. Export for FE/BE use.
tasks.testStrategy: TypeScript compiles without errors, generate mock data validating all union types, coverage for all evidence states

subtasks.title: Define TenantContext and TenantSettings Types
subtasks.description: Create TypeScript interfaces for TenantContext { tenantId: string, portalId: string, settings: TenantSettings } and TenantSettings { defaultProvider?: string, thresholds: ThresholdConfig }
subtasks.details: Place in /shared/types/index.ts. Ensure TenantSettings references ThresholdConfig. Export for FE/BE shared use. Use branded types for tenantId/portalId if possible for safety.
subtasks.testStrategy: Type checks compile, verify TenantContext requires all fields, ThresholdConfig nested properly

subtasks.title: Define ThresholdConfig and LlmProviderConfig Types
subtasks.description: Implement ThresholdConfig { freshnessMaxDays: number, minConfidence: number } and LlmProviderConfig { provider: union of strings, model: string, apiKeyRef: string, endpointUrl?: string }
subtasks.details: Add union type for provider: 'anthropic'|'openai'|'gemini'|'openrouter'|'custom'. Make numbers precise with branded types or constraints. Config-driven, no hardcoded values.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate union literals for provider, ensure optional fields handled, numbers >0 constraints

subtasks.title: Define ProviderConfig and Update StateFlags Type
subtasks.description: Create ProviderConfig { name: string, enabled: boolean, apiKeyRef: string, thresholds: ThresholdConfig } and finalize StateFlags with all 8 QA states
subtasks.details: StateFlags: { stale, degraded, lowConfidence, ineligible, restricted, ... } as boolean flags per PRD. ProviderConfig supports multi-provider setup.
subtasks.testStrategy: Type checks all StateFlags properties exist, ProviderConfig requires thresholds reference

subtasks.title: Update Snapshot, Evidence, and Person Types with TenantId
subtasks.description: Extend existing Snapshot, Evidence, Person types to include tenantId: string. Scope all fields to tenant context.
subtasks.details: Snapshot adds tenantId, evidence: Evidence[], people: Person[] all tenant-scoped. Evidence adds tenantId. Person unchanged structurally but tenant-aware.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify tenantId required on Snapshot/Evidence, arrays properly typed, no breaking changes to Person

subtasks.title: Implement Tenant-Aware Factory Functions
subtasks.description: Create factory functions for Snapshot, Evidence, Person, StateFlags that accept tenantId parameter and enforce tenant isolation.
subtasks.details: Functions like createSnapshot(tenantId: string, ...), createEvidence(tenantId: string, ...). Generate fixtures for tenant A/B isolation testing.
subtasks.testStrategy: Factories produce valid tenant-scoped objects, tenant A data doesn't leak to tenant B fixtures

subtasks.title: Add TypeScript Type Tests for Tenant Scoping
subtasks.description: Write TDD type tests verifying tenantId presence, isolation, and factory function correctness per TDD rule.
subtasks.details: Use TypeScript's conditional types to test tenantId required everywhere. Verify factory outputs match domain contracts with correct tenant scoping.
subtasks.testStrategy: Type errors if tenantId missing, fixtures validate multi-tenant isolation, coverage for all types

subtasks.title: Export All Domain Types and Run Full Compilation
subtasks.description: Export complete domain model from /shared/types for FE/BE use. Verify full TypeScript compilation with all updates.
subtasks.details: Barrel export: export * from './domain-types'. Update any existing imports. Ensure no type errors across shared codebase.
subtasks.testStrategy: tsc --noEmit succeeds, all exports resolvable, generate mock data validating union types and tenant scoping

tasks.title: Target Account Gating and Eligibility Logic
tasks.description: Implement FR2 eligibility check using hs_is_target_account property with configurable fallback
tasks.details: Backend service: fetchHubSpotCompany(companyId) -> check hs_is_target_account boolean. Configurable via DB config table (default: true if missing). Return {eligible: boolean, reason: 'ineligible' | 'unconfigured'}. Cache results 5min. No hardcoding.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: eligible=true/false/missing, integration test with mock HubSpot API, verify fallback behavior

subtasks.title: Write Comprehensive TDD Test Suite
subtasks.description: Create unit and integration tests covering all eligibility scenarios before any implementation.
subtasks.details:
Tests must cover: eligible=true, eligible=false, property missing (unconfigured), API error handling, cache hit/miss, configurable property name from DB. Use mocks for HubSpot API and DB. Ensure 100% coverage for edge cases per PRD FR2.
<info added on 2026-04-10T23:33:28.630Z>
TENANT ISOLATION UPDATE: All eligibility tests must include tenant_id scoping. The eligibility service must: (1) receive tenantId from middleware context, (2) use tenant-specific gating property name from provider_config (scoped by tenant_id), (3) use tenant-specific HubSpot credentials. Test cases must include: tenant A eligible, tenant B ineligible for same company_id (different portals). Cache must be keyed by (tenantId, companyId) not just companyId.
</info added on 2026-04-10T23:33:28.630Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Run all tests to verify green suite before proceeding; include assertions for {eligible: boolean, reason: string} outputs

subtasks.title: Setup HubSpot API Client
subtasks.description: Initialize @hubspot/api-client with private app access token from environment variables.
subtasks.details: Create fetchHubSpotCompany(companyId) function to retrieve company properties including configurable gating property (default 'hs_is_target_account'). Handle API errors gracefully with try-catch. No hardcoded tokens or properties.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock API responses in tests from subtask 1 to verify client fetches properties correctly

subtasks.title: Implement Eligibility Check Service
subtasks.description: Build core logic to evaluate target account eligibility based on fetched property.
subtasks.details: Check boolean value of gating property; return {eligible: true, reason: 'eligible'} if true/missing with default true fallback; {eligible: false, reason: 'ineligible'} if false; {eligible: false, reason: 'unconfigured'} if property unusable. Fail safely per PRD.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate against test cases from subtask 1: true/false/missing/unconfigured scenarios pass

subtasks.title: Add Caching Layer with 5-Minute TTL
subtasks.description: Implement result caching to store eligibility outcomes for companyId with 5-minute expiration.
subtasks.details: Use in-memory cache (e.g., lru-cache or Redis if available) keyed by companyId. Cache {eligible, reason} on fetch. Check cache first on calls, refresh on miss/expiry. Ensure thread-safe in Hono context.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test cache hit (no API call, returns cached), miss (fetches and caches), expiry after 5min from subtask 1

subtasks.title: Integrate Config-Driven Property Name
subtasks.description: Connect to provider_config DB table to read gating property name dynamically.
subtasks.details: Query DB for gating_property_name (default 'hs_is_target_account' if missing). Use Drizzle ORM. Cache config reads separately if frequent. Ensure no hardcoding; fallback to default on DB errors.
subtasks.testStrategy: Tests from subtask 1 verify configurable name: default and custom property scenarios work

subtasks.title: Verification and Integration Testing
subtasks.description: Run full test suite, integrate into /api/snapshot endpoint, and verify end-to-end.
subtasks.details: Expose eligibility service in Hono backend. Test full flow: companyId -> cached eligibility. Manual verification with real HubSpot token (dev env). Update snapshot contract to include eligibility/reason. Ensure deps on tasks 2,4,5 satisfied.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end: mock HubSpot + DB, curl endpoint verifies {eligible, reason} in response; measure cache performance

tasks.title: Configuration-Driven Provider Adapter Layer
tasks.description: Implement FR9 modular Exa provider integration with config-driven enablement/thresholds
tasks.details: DB config table: providers {name: 'exa', enabled, apiKeyEncrypted, thresholds}. Abstract ProviderAdapter interface. Exa adapter: minimal company name/domain to Exa Search API, parse recent signals. Configurable freshness (<7d), confidence (>0.7). No hardcoded secrets.
tasks.testStrategy: Toggle provider on/off via config, test Exa calls with mock/stub return signal data, verify thresholds filter results

subtasks.title: Define LlmAdapter Interface
subtasks.description: Create TypeScript interface for LLM adapters with complete method signature supporting tenant-specific options.
subtasks.details: Interface: LlmAdapter { provider: string; complete(prompt: string, options?: LlmOptions): Promise<LlmResponse> }. Define LlmOptions (model, maxTokens, temperature) and LlmResponse (content, usage). Ensure data minimization constraints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate interface compilation and type checking with mock implementations.

subtasks.title: Implement AnthropicAdapter
subtasks.description: Build Anthropic-specific LLM adapter reading tenant config and calling Anthropic API with data minimization.
subtasks.details: Constructor takes decrypted API key, model name from tenant llm_config. Map LlmOptions to Anthropic Messages API format. Implement streaming support if available. Mock API responses for TDD.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test with mock Anthropic responses: valid completion, rate limit, auth error. Verify no PII in requests.

subtasks.title: Implement OpenAiAdapter and CustomOpenAiCompatibleAdapter
subtasks.description: Create OpenAI adapter and generic OpenAI-compatible adapter for custom endpoints from tenant config.
subtasks.details: Shared base class for OpenAI format. Custom adapter supports endpoint URL override. Handle both Chat Completions and legacy endpoints. Tenant-specific model/API key resolution.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test OpenAI and custom endpoint with mock responses. Verify tenant A OpenAI vs tenant B custom works.

subtasks.title: Implement GeminiAdapter and OpenRouterAdapter
subtasks.description: Build adapters for Google Gemini and OpenRouter supporting tenant-specific models and routing.
subtasks.details: Gemini: Google Generative AI SDK integration. OpenRouter: Custom headers for model routing. Both read tenant llm_config for API keys/models. Ensure consistent LlmResponse format.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock API responses testing completion, token usage, error handling. Cross-verify response normalization.

subtasks.title: Develop LlmAdapterFactory
subtasks.description: Create factory that resolves tenant-specific LLM adapter from llm_config table with key decryption.
subtasks.details: Method: getAdapter(tenantId: string): Promise<LlmAdapter>. Query DB by tenant_id, decrypt apiKeyEncrypted, instantiate correct adapter class. Graceful fallback for missing config.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test tenant A→Anthropic, tenant B→OpenAI, missing config→fallback. Verify decryption/isolation.

subtasks.title: Update Exa Signal ProviderAdapter
subtasks.description: Enhance Exa adapter for per-tenant config from provider_config table with thresholds and freshness.
subtasks.details: Read tenant-specific enabled/apiKeyEncrypted/thresholds/freshness from provider_config. Call Exa Search API with company name/domain. Parse signals filtering by configurable confidence/freshness.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock Exa API: test thresholds filter results, tenant toggles, freshness <7d. Verify no hardcoded secrets.

subtasks.title: Implement Per-Tenant Config Resolution Service
subtasks.description: Build service for querying/decrypting provider_config and llm_config tables by tenant_id.
subtasks.details: Shared ConfigResolver class: getLlmConfig(tenantId), getProviderConfig(tenantId, providerName). Handle encryption/decryption. Cache results with TTL. Support multiple providers per tenant.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests: tenant isolation, decryption, cache hit/miss, missing tenant fallback.

subtasks.title: Add Data Minimization and Comprehensive Tests
subtasks.description: Implement prompt data minimization guardrails and full TDD suite for adapters/factory.
subtasks.details: Prompt sanitizer strips PII/CRM dumps. Tests: multi-tenant isolation (A=Anthropic/B=OpenAI), factory resolution, Exa thresholds, missing config fallback, no PII in requests.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end: tenant scenarios, mock APIs, verify isolation/minimization. Coverage >90% on adapters.

tasks.title: Dominant Reason Generation and People Selection
tasks.description: Implement FR4/FR5: generate 1 reason-to-contact + 0-3 people with reasons from provider signals
tasks.details: Snapshot service: aggregate provider signals -> extract dominant signal (most recent/high-confidence) -> generate reason text. Fetch HubSpot contacts (limit 20) -> rank by relevance to signal -> select top 3 with reasonToTalk. Never fabricate. Use fixture data initially.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock provider signals generate valid reason/people, test 0/1/2/3 people cases, verify no fabrication when insufficient data

subtasks.title: Implement Dominant Signal Extraction
subtasks.description: Create function to aggregate provider signals and select the highest-confidence, most-recent signal meeting thresholds.
subtasks.details:
Use factory functions from Task 5 to generate fixture signals. Implement logic to compare timestamp and confidence scores, return null if no signal passes thresholds. Ensure single dominant signal output.
<info added on 2026-04-10T23:33:41.788Z>
Tenant-scoped dominant signal extraction: all signal aggregation and selection must be filtered by tenantId. LLM provider resolution: use LlmAdapterFactory (Task 7) to resolve the tenant's configured LLM provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, OpenRouter, or custom) before calling reason generation or ranking logic. Factory functions must accept tenantId as a required parameter. Data minimization for LLM calls: extract only company name and signal summary (source, confidence, timestamp, key insight) and send to LLM; never include raw CRM data, contact details, or internal identifiers. Implement validation to ensure tenantId is present and valid before any LLM provider lookup or signal processing. Document tenant isolation boundaries and LLM provider routing in implementation.
</info added on 2026-04-10T23:33:41.788Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with fixture data: test most-recent wins, highest-confidence tiebreaker, no-signal empty state, threshold failures.

subtasks.title: Implement Reason Text Generation
subtasks.description: Generate human-readable reason-to-contact text from the dominant signal content.
subtasks.details: Map signal types to templated text using signal content fields. Handle edge cases like partial signal data. Return empty string if no dominant signal. Use fixture signals for initial implementation.
subtasks.testStrategy: TDD with fixtures: verify text generation for different signal types, empty input returns empty, malformed signals handled gracefully.

subtasks.title: Implement HubSpot Contact Fetch
subtasks.description: Fetch up to 20 contacts associated with the company from HubSpot API.
subtasks.details: Integrate HubSpot API client with companyId parameter, limit=20. Mock API responses using fixture data initially. Handle auth and errors. Return empty array on failures.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock HubSpot responses: test 0/5/20 contacts returned, error handling, auth middleware integration.

subtasks.title: Implement Contact Ranking by Relevance
subtasks.description: Rank fetched contacts by relevance to dominant signal using title/role match and recency.
subtasks.details: Define scoring function: keyword match on titles/roles to signal content (0-1 score), recency decay. Sort descending. Use fuzzy matching libraries if needed. Fixtures for contacts.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: rank scenarios with title matches, recency variations, no-signal skips ranking, ties handled consistently.

subtasks.title: Implement People Selection Service
subtasks.description: Select top 0-3 ranked contacts and generate reasonToTalk from signal + contact context.
subtasks.details: Slice top 3 from ranked list. Generate reasonToTalk by combining dominant reason text with contact-specific details (e.g., 'Talk to [role] about [signal]'). Support 0 selections gracefully.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests: 0/1/2/3 people cases, verify reasonToTalk format, no fabrication when <3 contacts available.

subtasks.title: Snapshot Service Integration and Edge Case Verification
subtasks.description: Integrate all components into snapshot service endpoint and verify all edge cases with TDD.
subtasks.details:
Wire components into /api/snapshot/:companyId. Use fixture data throughout. Test full data flow. Ensure no fabrication: empty states for no-signal/no-contacts. Update Hono endpoint contract.
<info added on 2026-04-10T23:33:51.449Z>
TENANT + LLM PROVIDER UPDATE: Snapshot service integration must pass tenantId through the entire flow: tenant resolution → eligibility check → signal fetching (tenant's Exa key) → LLM reason generation (tenant's LLM provider) → contact ranking → snapshot assembly. All fixture data must include tenantId. Test multi-tenant scenario: tenant A gets Anthropic-generated reason, tenant B gets OpenAI-generated reason, both isolated.
</info added on 2026-04-10T23:33:51.449Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end tests: no-signal empty, 0/1/2/3 people, low-confidence suppression, integration with Tasks 5-7, Postman/curl verification.

tasks.title: Trust, Freshness, and Suppression Logic
tasks.description: Implement evidence-state logic: stale/low-confidence/degraded/restricted suppression per trust rules
tasks.details: Trust service: evaluate evidence {freshness: timestamp <7d, confidence >0.7, sourceValid}. States: restricted->suppress, stale->flag, lowConf->flag+caution. Configurable thresholds. Backend computes final snapshot states. UI consumes pre-computed flags.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests cover all 8 QA states, integration verifies suppression (restricted empty), flags render correctly

subtasks.title: Implement Trust Evaluation Service
subtasks.description: Create the core trust service that orchestrates evaluation of evidence freshness, confidence, and source validity per configurable rules.
subtasks.details:
Define TrustEvaluator class in backend that takes Evidence object, reads thresholds from provider_config table (jsonb), computes all state flags (stale, lowConfidence, degraded, restricted). Use types from Task 5. Backend computes final snapshot states for UI consumption.
<info added on 2026-04-10T23:34:01.397Z>
TENANT ISOLATION UPDATE: TrustEvaluator must read thresholds from tenant-specific provider_config (scoped by tenant_id, not global). Each tenant may have different freshness/confidence thresholds. The service receives tenantId and queries config per tenant. Test that tenant A's lenient thresholds (3 day freshness, 0.5 confidence) produce different results than tenant B's strict thresholds (7 day, 0.9 confidence) for the same evidence data.
</info added on 2026-04-10T23:34:01.397Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: TDD: Unit test service integration with mock evidence and config; verify all 8 QA state combinations produce correct StateFlags object.

subtasks.title: Implement Freshness Checker
subtasks.description: Build freshness evaluation logic to determine if evidence timestamp is fresh (<7 days) or stale based on configurable threshold.
subtasks.details: Create isFresh() function comparing evidence.timestamp to current time against threshold from provider_config.days_fresh (default 7). Return {isFresh: boolean, ageDays: number}. Flag stale evidence with visible timestamp.
subtasks.testStrategy: TDD: Test boundary cases (exactly 7 days, 6.9 days, 7.1 days), configurable thresholds (3 days, 14 days), timezone edge cases.

subtasks.title: Implement Confidence Checker
subtasks.description: Develop confidence scoring logic to classify evidence as adequate (>0.7) or low-confidence with explicit score display.
subtasks.details: Create evaluateConfidence() function checking evidence.confidence against provider_config.min_confidence (default 0.7). Return {isAdequate: boolean, confidenceScore: number}. Low-confidence flags trigger caution UI.
subtasks.testStrategy: TDD: Test thresholds (0.699→low, 0.701→adequate), configurable values (0.5, 0.9), null/undefined handling.

subtasks.title: Implement Source Validator
subtasks.description: Create source validity checker for provider response and data parseability to detect degraded sources.
subtasks.details: Build validateSource() function checking provider responding (HTTP 200) + data parseable (JSON schema valid). Return {isValid: boolean, degradationReason?: string}. Degraded sources get distinct flagging from low-confidence.
subtasks.testStrategy: TDD: Mock provider failures (503, 404, parse errors), valid responses, schema mismatches.

subtasks.title: Implement Suppression Logic
subtasks.description: Apply suppression rules: restricted→empty response, stale/lowConf→double warning flags, degraded→system issue flag.
subtasks.details: Create applySuppression() function in TrustEvaluator: if restricted→return empty Snapshot (no evidence, no summary); else compute combined StateFlags and warnings array. Backend pre-computes all flags for UI.
subtasks.testStrategy: TDD: Verify restricted returns truly empty objects; test stale+lowConf double warning combinations; ensure partial data never leaks from restricted.

subtasks.title: Verification for All 8 QA States
subtasks.description: Write comprehensive TDD suite covering all 8 QA states with factory functions, configurable thresholds, and suppression validation.
subtasks.details: Use factory functions from Task 5 to generate test evidence for all combinations: fresh/adequate/valid, stale+lowConf+degraded+restricted×2. Test UI flag consumption. Verify configurable thresholds override defaults.
subtasks.testStrategy: 100% coverage of 8 QA states matrix; integration tests verify empty responses for restricted; snapshot tests for flag combinations; threshold mutation testing.

tasks.title: UI State Rendering and Evidence Inspection
tasks.description: Implement FR6/FR7: render all explicit states with evidence drill-down in React extension
tasks.details: Connect frontend to /api/snapshot. Render states: eligible-strong, fewer-contacts, empty, stale(warning), degraded(error), lowConf(caution), ineligible, loading. Evidence modal shows source/timestamp/confidence. Responsive design, accessible.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual QA all 8 states with fixture data, snapshot testing for UI states, evidence modal opens/closes correctly

subtasks.title: Write TDD render tests for all 8 UI states
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive render tests using createRenderer('crm.record.tab') covering eligible-strong, eligible-fewer-contacts, empty-no-reason, stale, degraded-source, low-confidence, ineligible, restricted states with fixture data from Task 5 factory functions
subtasks.details: Use @hubspot/ui-extensions/testing. Test each state renders correct HubSpot components (Alert variants, Text, DescriptionList). Verify findByTestId() queries for state-specific elements. Include snapshot testing for visual regression.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run all 8 state tests pass with mock snapshot data before implementation

subtasks.title: Write TDD tests for loading state and evidence modal
subtasks.description: Test LoadingSpinner renders during API fetch, evidence modal opens/closes correctly with source/timestamp/confidence data using findByTestId()
subtasks.details: Test modal trigger on evidence item click, Modal overlay shows DescriptionList with evidence fields. Verify keyboard accessibility (Escape closes). Test responsive modal on mobile viewport.
subtasks.testStrategy: Modal open/close cycles 5x, loading spinner visible 2s minimum, all evidence fields populate

subtasks.title: Implement main state renderer component
subtasks.description: Create central SnapshotStateRenderer component that maps Snapshot.eligibilityState to specific state handlers using switch or object map pattern
subtasks.details: Connect to /api/snapshot via existing hsMeta.companyId. Use Flex/Box layout. Handle loading/error states. Make responsive with HubSpot Tile. Ensure ARIA labels for accessibility.
subtasks.testStrategy: Component renders correct child state for each snapshot state input

subtasks.title: Implement eligible states (strong + fewer-contacts)
subtasks.description: Render full reason + people list (3 vs 1-2) + evidence drill-down triggers for eligible-strong and eligible-fewer-contacts
subtasks.details: Use DescriptionList for reason/people. Table or Flex for people cards with evidence chip/link. eligible-strong shows 3 people, fewer-contacts shows 1-2 + note. Add testId='eligible-strong'
subtasks.testStrategy: 3 people render in strong, 1-2 + note in fewer-contacts, evidence links present

subtasks.title: Implement warning/error states (stale, degraded, lowConf)
subtasks.description: Render Alert components: stale(warning) with age indicator, degraded-source(danger/error), lowConf(caution) with confidence score
subtasks.details: Alert variant='warning' for stale with timestamp age text. variant='danger' for degraded. lowConf shows confidence bar + caution text. All maintain reasonToContact.
subtasks.testStrategy: Correct Alert variant colors, confidence score displays accurately

subtasks.title: Implement empty/ineligible/restricted states
subtasks.description: Render explicit messages: empty-no-reason 'No credible reason', ineligible 'Account not eligible', restricted completely empty
subtasks.details: Use Text variant='microcopy' for messages. restricted returns null/empty Box. Add appropriate icons or visual hierarchy. Ensure accessible screen reader text.
subtasks.testStrategy: Explicit text matches PRD, restricted renders no content

subtasks.title: Implement evidence inspection modal + final verification
subtasks.description: Build Modal with evidence details (source/timestamp/confidence) + verify all 8 states responsive/accessible + manual QA
subtasks.details: Modal uses PanelBody/DescriptionListItem for evidence fields. Responsive with max-width. Add close Button variant='secondary'. Final smoke test all states on mobile/desktop.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual QA checklist: all 8 states, modal flow, responsive breakpoints, accessibility audit

tasks.title: Security, Permissions, and Local Development Setup
tasks.description: Add permission enforcement, auth, Docker local dev, verify all docs standards
tasks.details: Backend: HubSpot app auth validation, object-level access checks. Encrypt provider keys. Docker-compose: postgres, backend, frontend dev. Local HubSpot extension testing. Verify docs for all stack components (HubSpot, Hono, Drizzle).
tasks.testStrategy: Security audit: no secrets in client, restricted data blocked, docker env works end-to-end, docs verification checklist passed

subtasks.title: Implement Tenant Resolution Middleware
subtasks.description: Create Hono middleware to extract portal_id from HubSpot auth token, lookup tenant_id, set context, reject invalid requests
subtasks.details: Add middleware at /backend/src/middleware/tenant.ts. Parse HubSpot PRIVATE_APP_ACCESS_TOKEN, query tenants table via Drizzle, attach tenant_id to Hono.Context, return 401 for invalid/missing tenant. Ensure every API route uses this middleware.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test token parsing, integration test full resolution flow, cross-tenant leakage test (tenant A cannot access tenant B data)

subtasks.title: Enforce Database-Level Tenant Isolation
subtasks.description: Update all Drizzle queries and schema to include mandatory tenant_id WHERE clauses and composite indexes
subtasks.details: Modify schema from Task 2: add tenant_id to snapshots, evidence, people, config tables as first column. Create composite indexes (tenant_id, created_at), (tenant_id, company_id). Wrap all queries with tenant filter helper function. Add RLS policies if using Supabase.
subtasks.testStrategy: Query tests: insert tenant A data, verify tenant B cannot read. Performance test: index usage with EXPLAIN ANALYZE. Migration validation.

subtasks.title: Implement Provider Credential Encryption
subtasks.description: Encrypt/decrypt tenant-specific provider API keys at rest using secure key derivation
subtasks.details: Use Node crypto module or libsodium. Store encrypted keys in config table. Create encryptProviderKey(tenant_id, key), decryptProviderKey(tenant_id, encryptedKey) functions. Decrypt only in memory at API call time. Never log plaintext keys.
subtasks.testStrategy: Roundtrip encryption test, key derivation test, memory leak check, cross-tenant isolation (tenant A cannot decrypt tenant B keys)

subtasks.title: Configure HubSpot Private App Authentication
subtasks.description: Set up HubSpot private app with PRIVATE_APP_ACCESS_TOKEN validation and portal context extraction
subtasks.details: Create HubSpot private app in dev account. Frontend sends token in Authorization header. Backend validates via HubSpot API /auth/v3/private-apps/validate. Extract portal_id from response. Update .env.example with token placeholder.
subtasks.testStrategy: Valid/invalid token tests, portal_id extraction test, token expiry handling

subtasks.title: Finalize Docker-Compose Local Development
subtasks.description: Complete docker-compose.yml with postgres, backend, frontend services and tenant-aware volumes
subtasks.details: Update from Task 1: services for postgres (with init scripts), backend (Hono), frontend (Vite dev). Separate volumes per service for tenant isolation. Healthchecks, depends_on. Local HubSpot extension testing via ngrok/tunnel.
subtasks.testStrategy: docker-compose up end-to-end test, verify all services healthy, tenant middleware works locally

subtasks.title: Setup Test HubSpot Account with Mock Data
subtasks.description: Create dedicated HubSpot dev account with multi-tenant mock data covering all 8 QA states
subtasks.details: Two portals: tenant A (eligible-strong, stale, etc.), tenant B (ineligible, restricted). Populate CRM with mock companies/people/evidence. Document connection instructions. Include 8 QA states from Task 9.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify data isolation between portals, API queries return correct tenant data

subtasks.title: Configure Deployment and Vercel/HubSpot CLI
subtasks.description: Set up Vercel CLI for preview/deploy and HubSpot CLI for app management with tenant config
subtasks.details: Add vercel.json, hubspot.config.yml. Scripts for preview deploys per tenant. Environment variable mapping for multi-tenant (DATABASE_URL, etc.). HubSpot app private install instructions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Deploy preview, verify tenant isolation in production-like env, CLI commands work

subtasks.title: Create Security Artifact Documentation
subtasks.description: Document all security measures, tenant isolation, encryption, auth flows for audit and onboarding
subtasks.details: Create /docs/SECURITY.md covering tenant middleware, DB isolation, encryption, RLS, cross-tenant tests. Include architecture diagram, threat model, compliance checklist (GDPR, SOC2 basics). Verify all stack docs (HubSpot, Hono, Drizzle).
subtasks.testStrategy: Peer review doc completeness against requirements checklist

subtasks.title: Full Security Verification and Cross-Tenant Tests
subtasks.description: Run comprehensive TDD security audit, verify no leakage, docs standards, end-to-end local dev
subtasks.details: Write tests: cross-tenant leakage (A sees B data?), encryption roundtrip, middleware rejection, Docker E2E. Security audit checklist. Verify all docs standards. Manual QA all 8 states with isolation.
subtasks.testStrategy: 100% test coverage on security paths, zero leakage incidents, docker-compose works, docs checklist 100% pass

tasks.title: RLS Migration (0007)
tasks.description: Add migration 0007 to enable and force RLS policies on all tenant-scoped tables except tenants.
tasks.details: Task ID: rls-migration. Create packages/db/drizzle/0007_rls_policies.sql for snapshots, evidence, people, provider_config, llm_config, tenant_hubspot_oauth, and signed_request_nonce. Add migration tests proving RLS is enabled and forced. Keep tenants out of RLS because it is the bootstrap lookup table.
tasks.testStrategy: Write a failing migration test first, verify it fails, implement migration, rerun the targeted test, then rerun the broader test suite.

tasks.title: Tenant Transaction Helpers
tasks.description: Create withTenantTx and withTenantTxHandle so request and script queries run with SET LOCAL app.tenant_id.
tasks.details: Task ID: tenant-tx. Add apps/api/src/lib/tenant-tx.ts with transaction helpers and tests proving the session variable is set and tenant scoping works under RLS.
tasks.testStrategy: Write failing tests for current_setting and cross-tenant visibility first, confirm failure, implement helpers, and rerun focused plus broad tests.

tasks.title: Replay Nonce Library
tasks.description: Implement nonce recording, body hashing, and nonce sweeping support.
tasks.details: Task ID: replay-nonce-lib. Add apps/api/src/lib/replay-nonce.ts and scripts/sweep-nonces.ts. recordNonce uses INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING; computeBodyHash uses SHA-256. Tests must cover duplicate and tenant-scoped nonce behavior.
tasks.testStrategy: Write failing unit tests for duplicate detection and body hashing first, confirm failure, implement the library and sweep script, then rerun tests.

tasks.title: RLS Middleware Wiring
tasks.description: Inject the RLS-bound DB handle in index.ts and remove route/service reliance on process-wide DB construction.
tasks.details: Task ID: rls-wiring. Add the request-scoped DB middleware after tenantMiddleware in apps/api/src/index.ts, update snapshot route to use c.get('db'), and add cross-tenant regression coverage proving RLS blocks cross-tenant access.
tasks.testStrategy: Write failing route/integration tests first, confirm failure, wire the middleware and route changes, then rerun tests and regression checks.

tasks.title: Nonce Middleware Wiring
tasks.description: Wire replay detection into the request path after auth and tenant resolution.
tasks.details: Task ID: nonce-wiring. Add apps/api/src/middleware/nonce.ts, stash rawBody in hubspot-signature middleware, and reject duplicate replay attempts with 401 replay_detected while preserving tenant-scoped behavior.
tasks.testStrategy: Write failing middleware tests for duplicate and cross-tenant success cases first, confirm failure, implement wiring, and rerun focused plus broad tests.

tasks.title: Provider Contract Fix
tasks.description: Change ProviderAdapter.fetchSignals to accept a structured SignalContext argument and update all callers and tests.
tasks.details: Task ID: provider-contract-fix. Update the adapter interface, snapshot assembler, wrappers, all signal adapters, and tests so the contract is fetchSignals(tenantId, { companyId, companyName?, domain? }).
tasks.testStrategy: Write failing contract and call-site tests first, confirm failure, implement the interface change, then rerun affected tests and the full suite.

tasks.title: HubSpot Enrichment Adapter
tasks.description: Replace the stub with a real adapter that uses companyId and the tenant-aware HubSpot client.
tasks.details: Task ID: hubspot-enrichment. Implement the real adapter, add getCompanyEngagements to apps/api/src/lib/hubspot-client.ts, extend signal factory deps with db and tenantId, and cover both injected and default-construction paths with tests and cassettes.
tasks.testStrategy: Write failing adapter tests first, confirm failure, implement the adapter and client changes, then rerun cassette-backed tests and the full suite.

tasks.title: Card Bundling Bridge
tasks.description: Bundle the real HubSpot extension into the HubSpot project card entry as a locked dist/index.js build.
tasks.details: Task ID: card-bundler. Add the Vite IIFE build, hubspot-card-entry.tsx, shared ExtensionRoot, bundle script, and re-export-based SignalCard bridge. Ensure the bundle script verifies dist/index.js exists.
tasks.testStrategy: Write failing bundle existence or re-export tests first, confirm failure, implement the bundling bridge, then rerun targeted tests and the bundle command.

tasks.title: Biome DB Import Restriction
tasks.description: Add a Biome restriction that blocks runtime DB client construction in routes and services without blocking schema/type imports.
tasks.details: Task ID: lint-db-imports. Update biome.json so createDatabase is restricted in apps/api/src/routes and apps/api/src/services while legitimate @hap/db schema, type, eq, and sql imports remain allowed.
tasks.testStrategy: Add or run failing lint cases first, confirm the rule catches banned imports but permits allowed ones, implement the config, then rerun lint.

tasks.title: Docs Sweep
tasks.description: Update security docs and remove stale Slice 3 TODO references after implementation lands.
tasks.details: Task ID: docs-sweep. Update docs/security/SECURITY.md with the RLS and replay-nonce sections and clean stale comments or references, including any necessary CLAUDE.md cleanup from doc-path drift.
tasks.testStrategy: Review docs after implementation against the accepted architecture and acceptance criteria, then verify referenced commands and sections are accurate.

tasks.title: Security Audit
tasks.description: Perform a PASS/FAIL audit of OAuth, RLS, replay-nonce, and card bundling after implementation and docs are complete.
tasks.details: Task ID: security-audit. Review the completed Phase 3 changes against the intended security posture and record PASS or concrete findings for each area.
tasks.testStrategy: Use code inspection and the implemented tests plus validation commands to determine PASS/FAIL per audited area.

tasks.title: Code Review Follow-Up
tasks.description: Push the branch, run external review tools, and address real findings.
tasks.details: Task ID: code-review. After security audit passes, push the branch, run CodeRabbit CLI plus an independent review pass, and fix any substantive issues that come back.
tasks.testStrategy: Review tool output, reproduce real findings where needed, fix them under TDD, and rerun the affected validation commands.

tasks.title: Final Validation
tasks.description: Run the full validation matrix and verify all Phase 3 acceptance criteria are satisfied.
tasks.details: Task ID: validate-all. Run install, lint, test, typecheck, db:migrate, bundle, and grep-based validation commands. Confirm acceptance criteria for RLS, replay-nonce, provider contract, card bundling, and documentation updates.
tasks.testStrategy: Execute the full validation command list from the approved plan and record pass/fail outcomes against every acceptance criterion.
